item.title: 8 Ways Creators Can Monetize Away From Socials
item.description: The creator economy has matured well past the era of sponsored posts being a creator’s only income stream.

item.title: AI Is Coming For The Design Stack
item.description: AI is stepping directly into the design game with new models and product releases that target design processes and tools directly.

item.title: AI Fears Keep Hammering Software Stocks—Even Those Reporting Good Earnings
item.description: IBM and ServiceNow beat earnings expectations, but investors remain pessimistic.

item.title: After Earth Day, Understand The Transit Compromise To Grasp Efficiency
item.description: It's counter-intuitive, but smaller, van-sized vehicles can make more energy-efficient transit than buses and trains, because better service means les...

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Friday, April 24 Clues And Answers (#1,048)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.
